condition: "doss_deal_struck" in player.flags and "stood_for_prudence" in player.flags and not ("doss_noticed_seen" in player.flags)

opens.text: One more thing, captain. — Doss doesn't look up from her ledger. — You stepped into a swing that was meant for your droid. In my bar, in front of my dockers, before you knew my name or my credit. I price that in. People who stand where you stood keep cold-chain crates cold. It's the ones who watch that I make sign twice.

watches.text: Twice through a refinery fire, captain. You learn what burns and what doesn't. — She finally looks up, and the trader's smile has something older behind it. — Your pilot flies asleep people through hyperspace and your captain steps in front of swings. That ship runs on something the Compact doesn't have an audit category for. Fly.
